---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or workflow this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of how you'd like it to work.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Pre-submission Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have described a concrete use case, not just a feature in the abstract
- [ ] I understand that feature requests require a linked issue before a PR will be accepted
